title: [Zrenigotham House, Kitchen]
description: Moonlight filters in through a wide double-pane window, casting a silvery glow on the smoke grey stone floors flecked with pale rose inclusions.  The rich mahogany walls deepen in shadow and a dining table, ringed by carved dark wood chairs, is draped with cool ivory linen.  A standalone pantry with detailed doors looms like a relic near one wall, resting on clawed feet.  A cloud grey porcelain sink rests upon a long counter beneath the window's pale light, while an arched hallway offers access back to the sitting room.
room.location: Zrenigotham House, inside the frontier town of Wehnimer's Landing
